scripts.setup: npm run setup:backend && npm run setup:frontend && npm run setup:ai
scripts.setup:ai: cd ai_service && python3 -m venv venv && ./venv/bin/pip install fastapi uvicorn groq python-dotenv pillow python-multipart requests
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:ai" "npm run start:frontend"
